case_title: KASPAR DAUGAARD VS. JOHN DOES ET AL

DISCOVERY 302, "IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS CURRENTLY CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENTS 301/302 ARE HEREBY VACATED. WHEN THE COURT RESUMES NORMAL OPERATIONS, THE PRESIDING JUDGE WILL ANNOUNCE PROCEDURES FOR SETTING HEARING DATES FOR THOSE CASES WHICH HAVE BEEN FULLY BRIEFED. OPPOSITIONS WILL BE DUE BASED ON THE RESCHEDULED HEARING DATE, BUT NOTHING PRECLUDES A PARTY FROM FILING AN OPPOSITION EARLIER." (302)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, IN RESPONSE TO THE COVID-19 OUTBREAK, THE HEARING DATES FOR ALL LAW AND MOTION AND DISCOVERY MATTERS IN DEPARTMENT 302 FILED BEFORE JUNE 1, 2020 ARE OFF CALENDAR PURSUANT TO THE COURT'S GENERAL ORDERS. TO RE-SCHEDULE THE HEARING, PLEASE REFER TO THE PUBLIC NOTICE TO RESTORE SERVICES ISSUED ON MAY 27, 2020 AVAILABLE ON THE COURT'S WEBSITE AT HTTPS://SFSUPERIORCOURT.ORG/. (302/EPS)

DISCOVERY, DEPT. 302, AS TO THE JUL-22-2020 HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KASPAR DAUGAARD'S MOTION FOR EARLY DISCOVERY AND RELATED ORDERS, THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING. NO OPPOSITION FILED; MOTION GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED SUFFICIENT GROUNDS FOR EARLY DISCOVERY UNDER KRINSKY V. DOE (2008) 159 CAL.APP.4TH 1154. GOOGLE AND FACEBOOK RETAIN THE RIGHT TO ASSERT OBJECTIONS THEY DEEM APPROPRIATE TO PLAINTIFF'S SUBPOENAS WHEN THEY ARE SERVED. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID MCDONALD; CLERK: SEAN KANE; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

Plaintiffs Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion For Early Discovery And Related Orders
Off Calendar Jul-22-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF KASPAR DAUGAARD'S Motion For Early Discovery And Related Orders.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. No opposition filed; motion granted. The Court finds that Plaintiff has established sufficient grounds for early discovery under Krinsky v. Doe (2008) 159 Cal.App.4th 1154. Google and Facebook retain the right to assert objections they deem appropriate to Plaintiff's subpoenas when they are served.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Early Discovery And Related Orders
Off Calendar Jan-06-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey M. Rosenfeld, esq. (415-955-1155x.112) of Kronenberger Rosenfeld for Plaintiff/Moving party.
Court reporter: Sandra Susana Petritsch CSR #11684 (510-393-4897).

no other appearances.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's transcript). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFF KASPAR DAUGAARD's Motion For Early Discovery And Related Orders is GRANTED.

Moving party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling via email to klgallo@discoveryreferee.com

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Gallo, Clerk: S. Le, Court reporter: Sandra Susana Petritsch CSR #11684 (510-393-4897). =(302/JPT)
